Notice Of Motion To Compel Further Responses To Special Interrogatories, Form Interogatories, And Request For Production Of Documents From Pltf; Request For Monetary Sanctions In The Amount Of $800.00
Off Calendar Aug-23-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:SAMIN T. ZAMANIAN, ESQ. for Maskey Dikesh, Yellow Cab Cooperative, plaintiff and moving party appearing telephonically; TODD THYBERG, ESQ. for Ronel Jose, plaintiff and opposing party appearing telephonically.

DEFENDANTS MASKEY DIKESH and YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE, INC.'s Motion To Compel Further Responses To Special Interrogatories, And Request For Production Of Documents From Plaintiff Andrew Hawkins is granted. Plaintiff's objections were a misuse of the discovery process. Plaintiff is ordered to respond further within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded against Plaintiff in the amount of $560, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Commissioner Everett A. Hewlett. Not reported.

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Further Responses To Special Interrogatories, Form Interrogatories, And Req. For Production Of Documents From Pltf Ronel Jose; Req. For Monetary Sanction In The Amount Of $800.00
Off Calendar Aug-23-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:SAMIN T. ZAMANIAN, ESQ. for Maskey Dikesh, Yellow Cab Cooperative, plaintiff and moving party appearing telephonically; TODD THYBERG, ESQ. for Ronel Jose, plaintiff and opposing party appearing telephonically.

DEFENDANTS MASKEY DIKESH and YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE, INC.'s Motion To Compel Further Responses To Special Interrogatories, And Request For Production Of Documents From Plaintiff Ronel Jose is granted. Plaintiff's objections were a misuse of the discovery process. Plaintiff is ordered to respond further within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded against Plaintiff in the amount of $560, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Commissioner Everett A. Hewlett. Not reported.
